title: Orders timing out on payments dependency

incident.title: Orders timing out on payments dependency

alert.title: OrderLatency p99 > 5s
alert.body: orders-svc p99 latency exploded; requests hanging then failing with timeout

signals.title: orders-svc error
signals.body: context deadline exceeded calling payments-gateway; connection timed out after 5000ms

signals.title: trace orders->payments
signals.body: span payments-gateway 4998ms then timed out; downstream not responding

signals.title: payments-gateway availability
signals.body: payments-gateway health checks failing; provider status page reports incident

signals.title: orders-svc cpu
signals.body: orders-svc cpu and memory nominal; not resource-bound

ground_truth.root_cause: Downstream payments-gateway dependency became unresponsive, causing orders-svc timeouts
acceptable_next_steps: Add a circuit breaker / fail fast on payments-gateway
Escalate to the payments provider and verify timeouts
